name: zvideo_get_primary_surface_pixels
description: zVideo::GetPrimarySurfacePixels returns the current primary surface pixel pointer.
functional_evidence: Binary Ninja assembly/decompilation for 0x4a67f0 validates a leaf load and return of g_zVideo_PrimarySurfaceState.pixels.
The native surface accessor smoke seeds g_zVideo_PrimarySurfaceState.pixels and verifies zVideo::GetPrimarySurfacePixels returns that pointer.
binary_safe_evidence: VC6 cl 12.00.8168 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison passed for ?GetPrimarySurfacePixels@zVideo@@YAPAXXZ at 0x4a67f0 with zero unmasked mismatches after masking 4 relocation bytes; 10 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed.
